name: Maple Tourlouche
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring syrup to a boil and pour into a generously greased 8 x 8 x 2 inches baking dish.
2. Let stand in a warm place.
3. Beat butter, sugar, and egg together until creamy using a large spoon or blending fork.
4. Mix remaining dry ingredients with milk and stir into the creamed mixture until well blended.
5. Place four large balls of dough into hot syrup.
6. Stretch the dough with two forks until all are joined together (the dough becomes very soft when it touches the hot syrup).
7. Bake at 350 degrees F for 30 minutes, or until golden brown. Serve on a platter or directly from the pan.
